headline: How L3Harris’ Fiber‑Optic Tether Production Ramp Will Impact L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Investors
summary: Earlier in May 2026, L3Harris Technologies announced plans to ramp up production of its fiber-optic tether systems used to maintain secure communications with military drones and underwater platforms amid rising electronic warfare threats. This expansion highlights how L3Harris is leaning into demand from the Pentagon and allied forces for more resilient communications technology across defense and commercial applications. Now we’ll explore how this production ramp in fiber-optic tether...
